name: Better Pause
description: A mod with info on the pause menu

difficulty.name: Level Difficulty
difficulty.description: Displays level difficulty and star/moon count

stats.name: Level Stats
stats.description: Displays level like and download count

creator.name: Level Creator
creator.description: Displays level creator and their creator points stat

rewards.name: Level Rewards
rewards.description: Displays level orb and diamond rewards (if applicable)
